visuals.title: StringBuffer vs StringBuilder Decision Flow
visuals.description: Visual diagram for StringBuffer vs StringBuilder Decision Flow
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">StringBuffer and StringBuilder</text>

  <!-- StringBuffer Box -->
  <rect x="80" y="70" width="120" height="60" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="140" y="100" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="white" opacity="0">
    StringBuffer
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- StringBuilder Box -->
  <rect x="220" y="70" width="120" height="60" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="280" y="100" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="white" opacity="0">
    StringBuilder
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Thread-Safe Label -->
  <rect x="60" y="150" width="160" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="140" y="170" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Thread-Safe (Synchronized)
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Not Thread-Safe Label -->
  <rect x="200" y="150" width="160" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="280" y="170" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Not Thread-Safe (Faster)
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Common Features Box -->
  <rect x="110" y="220" width="200" height="40" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="245" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Mutable String Classes
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Arrow from Common to StringBuffer -->
  <path d="M160 220 L160 200 L140 200 L140 90" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>

  <!-- Arrow from Common to StringBuilder -->
  <path d="M260 220 L260 200 L280 200 L280 90" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>

  <!-- Performance Comparison -->
  <rect x="150" y="280" width="120" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="300" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    StringBuilder > StringBuffer
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
